info.title: Clarity Ingredient Safety API
info.description: The only ingredient safety API built on published research methodology with DOIs. 1,500+ validated ingredients across 15 safety dimensions. Evidence-graded for breastfeeding, pregnancy, toddler nutrition, histamine, DAO, CMPA, ADHD additives, heavy metals, blood pressure, and more. 174 contaminant products. 103 FDA recalls. 18 formula profiles. PubMed-cited. 9 languages.

post.summary: Check an ingredient for safety across 15 dimensions
post.description: Look up any ingredient by name. Supports 9 languages and alias matching (brand names, abbreviations, INCI names). Returns safety verdict, evidence tier, histamine/DAO signals, CMPA risk, ADHD flags, pregnancy safety, breastfeeding safety, and more.

q.description: Ingredient name, brand name, or alias to look up

200.description: Ingredient safety result with verdict, evidence tier, and dimensional safety data

get.summary: Scan a product barcode for ingredient safety
get.description: Submit a UPC/EAN barcode. Returns product name, brand, matched ingredients with individual safety verdicts, overall risk score, contaminant alerts, and flag summaries (ADHD, histamine, CMPA, heavy metals).

200.description: Product safety scan result with per-ingredient verdicts and flag alerts

404.description: Product not found in Open Food Facts database

post.summary: Create a Stripe checkout session for API subscription
post.description: Creates a Stripe Checkout session for subscribing to a paid API plan.
